Public-records journalism for Georgia. All individuals named are presumed innocent until proven guilty in a court of law. Arrests are allegations, not convictions.

Legal

Reporting public-record bookings under Ga. Code 50-18-72 (Open Records Act). We publish accurate facts, not opinions. Corrections reviewed within 72 hours.
